violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Licensed/registered Food Safety Manager for the establishment. Per the PIC, application for Certified Food Safety Manager License has been filled out and given to hotel management for submission. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Licensed/registered Food Safety Manager for the establishment. Application was printed and submitted to the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

A container with food debris still in it was observed placed back on the clean storage shelving for equipment. Containers were removed for proper cleaning and sanitizing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Sausage on the hot hold service line was observed held at 120 to 134 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the PIC, sausage was prepared prior to opening for breakfast. Sausage was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Clean utensils/equipment were stored with the food contact/lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees to prevent possible contamination of the food contact surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area was blocked by a large garbage can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The food probe thermometer was shown to not be calibrated. Consequently, a temperature problem may not be detected, or conversely, a corrective action may be needlessly taken if a temperature measuring device is not calibrated. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The facility could not provide test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
